events.label: assistant
events.text:
I reviewed the lookahead schedule: the recovery note proposes starting Framing (D) one day early by loading the slab before the Slab Cure (CC) period finishes. The legend marks hatched cure lags as a hard, non-compressible constraint — so this plan violates it directly and risks structural damage to the uncured slab.

Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: "fail"`, `risk: "high"`, flagging the cure-lag violation and recommending recovery via parallel MEP trades or finish-stage overlap instead.
